stemHtml:
For pre-flight planning purposes, what is the minimum Fuel required for the Commercial Air Transport flight in a Jet aircraft aeroplane, given the following information? Assume the Basic Fuel Scheme WITHOUT variations applies.

Trip Fuel: 3740 kg
Fuel to alternate: 936 kg
Taxi Fuel: 140 kg
Fuel flow at 1500 ft above destination aerodrome: 2132 kg/h
Fuel flow at 1500 ft above destination alternate: 2400 kg/h
Extra Fuel: 0 kg
Discretionary Fuel: 0 kg
